src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.general_idea: Replace direct EntityManager creation via JpaUtil with injection of EntityManagerService to decouple DAO from static utility.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.human_impl: private final EntityManagerService service; ... em = service.createEntityManager();

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.general_idea: Add Javadoc comments to the class and its public methods for better documentation.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.human_impl: /** * CRUD operations for the entities in DAO */ ... /** * Get all the entities by JPQL ... */

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.general_idea: Add project header comment with title and repository link.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.human_impl: /* * Introduction to Jakarta Enterprise Edition - JPA on Hibernate ... */

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.general_idea: Remove redundant null checks for EntityManager and EntityTransaction since they are now guaranteed to be non-null by the service.

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Emplo.general_idea: Added class-level Javadoc comment to document the entity's purpose.
Added @GeneratedValue annotation to specify IDENTITY strategy for the primary key.
Renamed transient field from transientNote to note for clarity.
Added a convenience constructor to initialize entity fields.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Emplo.human_impl: public Employee(int id, String firstName, String lastName, double salary) { ... }

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Emplo.general_idea: Updated getter and setter method names to match the renamed field.
Updated toString method to reflect the renamed field.
Introduce Log4j2 for structured logging in the DAO layer.
Replace static utility-based EntityManager creation with injection via a service provider.
Add java.util.Optional import to support modern return types for single-result queries.
Import specific JPA exceptions to handle query result uniqueness and existence checks.
Import EntityTransaction to support explicit transaction management for bulk operations.
Import Query and TypedQuery interfaces for explicit query type handling.
Rename readAllOrderBySalary to readBySalaryBottom to better reflect the specific filtering logic.
Rename readSalaryRange to readBySalaryRange for consistency with naming conventions.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Emplo.human_impl: public List<Employee> readBySalaryRange(double low, double high)

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Emplo.general_idea: Rename readSalaryTop to readBySalaryTop for consistency with naming conventions.
Add a new method to retrieve an employee by last name, returning Optional to handle missing or duplicate results.
Add a new method to delete employees within an ID range using bulk JPQL delete with transaction management.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Emplo.human_impl: public int deleteByIdBetween(int low, int high)

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Emplo.general_idea: Switch from positional parameters (?1) to named parameters (:min) for better readability and maintainability.
Use TypedQuery instead of raw Query to eliminate unchecked casts and improve type safety.
Add trace and error logging statements to track method entry and exceptions.
Add comprehensive Javadoc comments to the class and its methods.

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Regio.general_idea: Added class-level Javadoc and imported java.util.Objects for utility methods.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Regio.human_impl: import java.util.Objects; /** The standard region JavaBean used in the web app */

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Regio.general_idea: Implemented equals() and hashCode() methods using Objects utility to ensure proper entity identity comparison.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Regio.human_impl: @Override public int hashCode() { return Objects.hash(id, name); } @Override public boolean equals(Object obj) { ... }

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Regio.general_idea: Update the DAO constructor to explicitly inject the EntityManagerService dependency instead of relying on implicit initialization or default behavior.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Regio.human_impl: Changed constructor from `public RegionDao()` to `public RegionDao(EntityManagerService ems)` and passed `ems` to the superclass.

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Regio.general_idea: Add class-level and method-level documentation to explain the purpose of the DAO and the reason for passing the entity type due to type erasure.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Regio.human_impl: Added Javadoc comments for the class `RegionDao` and its constructor, including a link to the project repository.

pom.xml.general_idea: Updated Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
Migrated Servlet API from javax.servlet (4.0.1) to jakarta.servlet (6.0.0) to support Jakarta EE 10/Tomcat 10.1.
Migrated JSTL API from javax.servlet:jstl (1.2) to jakarta.servlet.jsp.jstl-api (3.0.0) for Jakarta EE 10 compatibility.
Migrated JSTL implementation from implicit/old to org.glassfish.web:jakarta.servlet.jsp.jstl (3.0.1) for Jakarta EE 10 compatibility.
Removed javax.annotation-api dependency as it is no longer needed or replaced in the Jakarta ecosystem.
Updated Hibernate Core from 6.1.3.Final to 6.4.2.Final to align with newer Jakarta EE standards and Java 21.
Updated Log4j Core from 2.17.2 to 2.22.1 for security and feature updates.
Removed JUnit Jupiter Engine test dependency.
Removed Tomcat 8 JNDI test dependency, likely due to migration to Tomcat 10.1 which has native JNDI support.
Updated PostgreSQL JDBC driver from 42.4.1 to 42.7.1.
Updated Maven WAR plugin from 3.3.2 to 3.4.0.

README.md.general_idea: Updated the README to reflect the migration from Java EE to Jakarta EE, specifying Java 21, Tomcat 10.1, and Hibernate 6.4.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'Java EE integration with DBMS via JPA' with a detailed list including 'Java 21', 'Apache Tomcat 10.1', and 'Hibernate ORM 6.4'.

README.md.general_idea: Added specific instructions for configuring the PostgreSQL JDBC resource in Tomcat 10.1.
README.md.human_impl: Added section 'As JDBC resource, access to PostgreSQL is assumed' with steps to place jar in lib and configure context.xml.

src/main/webapp/css/simple.css.general_idea: Updated the body background color and added styling rules for h1 and header elements to improve visual appearance.
src/main/webapp/css/simple.css.human_impl: Changed body background to #fafaee, added center alignment for h1, and added margin-bottom for header.

src/main/webapp/employee.jsp.general_idea: Wrapped the page title and navigation in semantic HTML5 header and nav elements to improve document structure.
Removed the redundant 'Back home' link at the bottom of the page since navigation is now provided in the header.

src/main/webapp/employees.jsp.general_idea: Replace plain heading and footer link with semantic header and navigation elements.
src/main/webapp/employees.jsp.human_impl: Wrapped <h1> in <header> and moved link into <nav>.

src/main/webapp/index.html.general_idea: Add language attribute and project header comment to the HTML document.
src/main/webapp/index.html.human_impl: <html lang="en"> <!-- Introduction to Jakarta Enterprise Edition ... -->

src/main/webapp/index.html.general_idea: Remove redundant type attribute from stylesheet link.
Rewrite navigation links to reflect new tutorial structure and entity examples.
src/main/webapp/index.html.human_impl: Replaced old employee-centric links with new session, region, country, and car examples.
